name: mybrain
description: Personal semantic thought storage and retrieval with vector embeddings and ltree scoping

database_url.title: PostgreSQL connection URL
database_url.description: postgres://user:pass@host:5432/dbname — must have pgvector + ltree extensions

embedding_api_key.title: OpenRouter API key
embedding_api_key.description: OpenRouter key for embeddings (https://openrouter.ai/keys). Leave blank if using local Ollama.

brain_scope.title: Default brain scope
brain_scope.description: ltree namespace that tags thoughts captured without an explicit scope (e.g. 'personal', 'work.research'). Comma-separate for multiple scopes.
